title: Search Feature in shared view
excerpt: We are posting our boards in a large Facebook group. One board includes a long list of local restaurants. Other platforms include a search or find feature, but I can’t seem to find this on Monday. Does it exist? Is it a …

posts.author: AskQuestions (KarenHowell)
posts.cookedHtml: We are posting our boards in a large Facebook group. One board includes a long list of local restaurants. Other platforms include a search or find feature, but I can’t seem to find this on Monday. Does it exist? Is it a customizable feature?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! Would our “Search Everything” feature work or the board search work for what you’re looking to do?

Here’s where you can find the board-specific search:

Screen Shot 2023-03-02 at 5.54.44 PM1308×316 22.2 KB

Let me know what you think!
